title: Respondent geographic distribution heavily concentrated in Indonesia
summary: Indonesia accounts for 79.0% (1,419) of respondents, followed by Singapore 9.7% (174), Malaysia 5.1% (92), Vietnam 2.9% (53), and Thailand 2.4% (44). Urban concentration is strong with Jakarta alone at 48.4%.
methodology: Self-reported country and city of residence in anonymous online survey
